name: Beans in the Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 can lima beans with 1 can kidney beans, 1 can butter beans, 1 large can Bushes Bake Beans, 1 cup catsup, 1 teaspoon dry mustard, 1/2 cup red wine, and 1/2 cup brown sugar in the crockpot.
2. Add crumbled cooked bacon to taste and 1 large chopped onion.
3. Cook all day on low heat. This recipe is great for parties or barbecues where guests can serve themselves from the pot and keep it warm without burning.
